evals.prompt: Log a coffee with @sarah-chen — talked about her new platform-engineer role; she's interested in our schema-registry work.
evals.expected_output: Updates wiki/people/sarah-chen.md (or wiki/network/relationships/sarah-chen.md): appends '- 2026-04-26: coffee — new platform-engineer role; interested in schema-registry' to the interactions section, bumps last_contact to today, updates modified. Changelog entry appended.

evals.prompt: After our 1:1, update @mark's page — he asked me to send the Kafka migration post by Friday.
evals.expected_output: Appends an interaction entry, bumps last_contact, and adds a `> [!important] Owed back to @mark by 2026-04-30: send Kafka migration post.` callout to the Open Asks section. The next request-tracker run will surface this.

evals.prompt: Log Dr. Patel's visit today for Ava — flu shot administered, follow-up in 6 weeks.
evals.expected_output: Updates wiki/people/dr-patel.md (family variant): appends a Recent Visits entry with date and visit summary, bumps last_contact, and adds a `> [!important] Follow-up due by 2026-06-07` callout that follow-up-tracker will surface. (Note: clinical detail about the flu shot lands in wiki/health/ava-medical.md via ingest-medical-record — person-update tracks the relationship touch, not the clinical record.)
